articles.title: World just experienced hottest decade on record, says UN report
articles.summary: PETALING JAYA: Marking World Meteorological Day, the United Nations' weather agency has declared that the planet has just experienced the hottest decade on record. Read full story

articles.title: Traffic snarls on major highways as Aidilfitri travellers head home
articles.summary: KUALA LUMPUR: Traffic on several major highways nationwide was heavy as of 5pm on Monday (March 23) as city dwellers returned to the capital after the Aidilfitri holidays. Read full story

articles.title: Early morning blaze destroys Putatan PPR unit, no casualties reported
articles.summary: KOTA KINABALU: A mother's quick thinking saved the lives of her three young children when their home caught fire early on Monday (Mar 23) morning.  Read full story

articles.title: Company ordered to pay RM476,124 to TNB over meter tampering
articles.summary: KUALA LUMPUR: The Klang Sessions Court has ordered a wood processing company to pay RM476,124.65 in compensation to Tenaga Nasional Berhad (TNB) over meter tampering.  Read full story
